Tems & Conditions :
1) Payment should be made by A/C payee cheque or Demand Draft only,
2) Any compaint for the goods should be made within 24 Hrs after that no
complaint will be  entertained.
3) Interest @ 24% Per annum will be charged after due date.
4) We are not responsible for any loss or damage during transit
5) We reserve the right of recovery before due date any time.
6) Goods once sold will not be taken back or exchanged.
